title: melica ciliata var. magnolii
intro: Melica ciliata var. magnolii, also known as the Magnolia-fruited Melic Grass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a type of grass that has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, Melica ciliata var. magnolii is often used as a tea or infusion, as well as a tincture or decoction, to harness its medicinal properties.
